result.summary: Found 4 issues: one major data inconsistency, two layout/clipping issues, and one minor navigation truncation issue.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section displays a badge reading '0 Games' even though multiple exclusive game tiles are visibly rendered below the heading.
issues.suggestion: Fix the game count logic or API call that populates this badge so it accurately reflects the number of games displayed in the section.

issues.description: The third column of game cards in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections is clipped/cut off at the right edge of the screen, making those tiles partially unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid or carousel layout to either fit within the viewport bounds or implement a proper horizontal scroll with visible scroll affordance (e.g., scroll indicator or partial reveal with padding).

issues.description: The horizontal navigation filter bar (Home, Tourney, Jackpots, Hot Ga...) has the last visible item 'Hot Ga...' truncated mid-word, with no scroll indicator to suggest more items exist.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll affordance such as a fade gradient or arrow indicator on the right edge of the scrollable navigation row to signal that additional items can be accessed.

issues.description: The bottom row of 'Top Played New Games' shows game tiles that are cut off vertically at the bottom of the viewport with no visual indicator of how many more games exist.
issues.suggestion: Add a 'See All' or 'View 26 Games' CTA button at the bottom of the section to improve discoverability and provide a clear path to all games.
